title: Albemarle: Shares Attractive On Valuation, But Bearish Technical Trends Seen

ALB is a major lithium producer with a positive long-term outlook due to the growth of electric vehicles, but recent technical signs and potential risks make it a hold rather than a buy. Such risks include dampening global demand for consumer electronics and EVs, increased supply from competitors, and lower lithium spot prices.

title: Using Return On Capital Employed To Generate Alpha With Dividend Aristocrats
text: Return on Capital Employed (ROCE) is a financial ratio that measures a company's profitability and efficiency in utilizing its capital to generate returns. Strategies that focus on investing in companies with high ROCE or significant improvements in ROCE have historically outperformed the overall market. ROCE should be incorporated into stock research as it is an important metric for evaluating the long-term performance of a business.

title: Albemarle Becomes First Lithium Producer to Complete Independent Audit and Publish IRMA Report
text: Company earns IRMA 50 Rating for Salar de Atacama Lithium Site in Chile CHARLOTTE, N.C. , June 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a global leader in providing essential elements for mobility, energy, connectivity and health, today announced that it achieved an IRMA 50 level of performance in an independent third-party assessment of its lithium brine extraction and concentration site in the Salar de Atacama, using the Initiative for Responsible Mining Assurance's (IRMA) comprehensive mining standard.
